title: Runic Railguns
description: Railguns you can attach runes to.
body:
Railguns... with a twist!
You can attach runic circuits to these for special effects.
Currently there are:
  - Obliteration: Sextuples damage and (with Volatile) explosion power
  - Volatile: Causes a power 6 explosion (36 with Obliteration) on hit
  - Hellfire: Sets entities on fire and (with Volatile) adds fire explosions.

More will be added in future releases; the initial releases were made for ModFest: Singularity.
